title: salix × fruticosa
intro: Salix × fruticosa, also known as the weeping willow or weeping sallow, is a hybrid of the willow genus, specifically a cross between Salix purpurea and Salix viminalis. The plant has been utilized for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × fruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Salix × fruticosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
